executives.name: Eric Woersching
executives.background: Mr. Woersching has served as a member of our Board since 2020. He is the Managing Partner of Evolute Capital and was previously a Portfolio Manager at Thiel Macro, LLC. Mr. Woersching holds a B.S. and M.S. in Electrical Engineering from Stanford University.
